{{CargoClone
|name=The Whole Circus
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=135
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Resolver: 4.5% chance +1 Cultivation Fluid
|gene4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Domain Cabin, deployable robots +2
|gene6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Domain Cabin, deployable robots +3
|}}
